did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that summarizes and analyzes existing literature on AI applications in skin tumor image recognition. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI methods itself, but rather discusses the performance, datasets, and challenges of AI models (such as CNNs and Transformers) reported in other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
